subcodes.first_line: In these days, the traces of the radiant effulgences of the Manifestation are visible and manifest from the horizons of the world, and the Day of the One Incomparable Friend hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایام آثار انوار تجلیات ظهور از آفاق عالم ظاهر و لائح یوم دوست یکتا ظاهر گشته
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @praise and encouragement
